description.p: Miniter is an basic video editor built for simple video editing tasks that doesn't aim to have features similar to complex editors, mostly for casual tasks. Has a simpler UI compared to most other video editors.

ul.li: linux hw: use git paths, and show the snackbar for fallback here too
split wasm loading logic to chunks (prevents lag on export), and also for thumbnails
Allow importing audio on the main project selection screen
fix web baaba compile issue, and use new web hw sync api
rm extra comments from decoder refactor
Add missing keyframe sections for audio/text clips
fix ivf files not being exportable
remove duration slider for text, and make it infinitely draggable
stack keyframes and basic color def to distinguish
Fix rotation being off by 90 degrees
clip the video to the preview
audio param ui for fade in/out and normalise
rename to video properties to effects, and add more effect layers
Add image support via image crate
Add transition out for clips, and also fix few transitions not appearing
the logic works and runs on web!
web shenanigans (vid doesn't play, but projectl loads)
remove thumbnail caching, causes too many issues to preserve (due to wasm)
going experimental (use my hardware d&e crate (web init too)
Partial hard subs (save, but add soft subs via ass -> srt in muxide fork)
Fix dual audio clips not being condensed, and also av1 video being not exported correctly with blank space
Fix video size issue for few mp4s, and opus audio err
Clarify Android save workaround in README
